title: Principal Instructional Designer at Arihant Publications

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Arihant Publications
jsonLd.description:
Arihant Publications invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Arihant Publications:
Arihant Publications is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications!
